context.projectOverview: Fleet Orchestrator Sprint 4 (makes the feature user-visible end-to-end): PortfolioReporter (build counts + atomic write of .bober/fleet-report.json), runFleet() entrypoint (load -> credential fail-fast -> coordinator.execute -> aggregate -> reporter.build -> reporter.write, always exits 0 on per-child failures), and registerFleetCommand(program) wired into src/cli/index.ts. The `run` command and runPipeline stay UNTOUCHED.

completedSprints.title: Coordinator + aggregator
completedSprints.summary: src/fleet/coordinator.ts (FleetCoordinator.execute(manifest) via mapBounded, never-reject thunk, DI for scaffolder/runner), src/fleet/aggregator.ts (OutcomeAggregator.aggregate(execution) -> ChildOutcome disk-primary + exit-code fallback), src/fleet/types.ts (ChildExecution, ChildOutcome{folder,status:'completed'|'failed'|'other',source,exitCode?,runId?,runState?}).
